title: nouhuysia pachyphylla
intro: Nouhuysia pachyphylla, also known as the 'Qinpi' or 'Tenguman', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cephalotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nouhuysia pachyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Nouhuysia pachyphylla can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with the recommended dosage varying depending on the specific preparation and intended use.
